items.name: Loadshift (Freelancer.com)
items.introduction: Australia's largest freight marketplace platform, connecting shippers with transport providers nationwide. Part of the global Freelancer.com network, enabling seamless freight booking and data-driven logistics solutions.
items.responsibilities: I lead product strategy and roadmap, data-driven growth features, AI workflow automation, and enterprise account programs across the full delivery cycle.

items.name: eBanma-Alibaba Cloud
items.introduction: An intelligent driving solutions company under Alibaba Group, providing autonomous driving and smart cockpit solutions for automotive enterprises.
items.responsibilities: I led the In-Vehicle Citylife Service Cloud Application and In-Vehicle AI Voice Assistant, serving connected vehicles at scale.

items.name: Alibaba
items.introduction: A comprehensive global e-commerce platform that connects buyers and sellers from all corners of the world. It serves as a hub for a vast array of products and services, enabling seamless transactions and providing a user-friendly experience.
items.responsibilities: I was responsible for after-sales service products in the e-commerce department, including chatbots, customer service workstations, and logistics service automation.
